title: aloe wildii
intro: Aloe wildii, a species of succulent plant, is a type of aloe that is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The medicinal properties of Aloe wildii lie in its gel, which contains aloin and other anthraquinones that have anti-inflammatory and soothing effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from skin irritations, such as burns, eczema, and sunburn, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Aloe wildii can be made into gels, creams, or ointments, which can be applied topically to the affected area for optimal results.
